name: Gemini → Markdown Download

data.description: Run while the Gemini conversation page is open
Scrape the Gemini conversation title and messages
Save the conversation as a Markdown file to the PC

data.title: Gemini Download
data.message: Done! Saved “{{variables.filename}}” to your Downloads folder.

description: Scrapes the currently open Gemini conversation and saves it as a Markdown file to your PC.
